zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

title: Refresh-token revocation flow not implemented at v0
scope: Slice-1 Identity & Tenancy: refresh-token revocation requires a server-side stateful session store (sessions table exists in migration 0001 but is not used by a /v1/auth/refresh route at v0).
linked_threat: ARC-005 §2.1 T-IT-3 (replay of stolen JWT after user signs out). Original severity: medium.
rationale: v0 ships access-token-only auth with 15-minute TTL (cfg.JWT_ACCESS_TTL_SECONDS=900). The window for replay is small; the demo runs locally with synthetic-data only (HD-008); no real attacker is in the threat model at v0. A full refresh-token revocation flow (server-side session table writes + revocation list + /v1/auth/refresh + /v1/auth/logout) is queued as patch bead TB-WC-2026-PATCH-REFRESH per slice-ralph-sweep-record.json §patch_beads_queued.
owner: claude-orchestrator (delivery owner) on behalf of construction-bead persona
approver: client_owner via HD-008 default-accept (synthetic-data-only at v0) — refresh-token-flow is implicitly scoped-down by HD-004 default-accept (production_surface=false at v0)
approval_basis: Implicit at checkpoint-#1 via HD-004 + HD-008 default-accept; explicit waiver record authored 2026-05-03 per Final Hawkeye F-FN-04 finding
expiry: Before production_surface=true transition; OR before adding any non-synthetic user data; whichever comes first
reactivation_trigger: Any of: (a) production_surface flag flips true, (b) real user data is loaded into the system, (c) session length is extended beyond 15 minutes without compensating control, (d) HD-008 synthetic-data-only is amended.
residual_risk: medium — replay window is bounded by JWT TTL (15 min); local-only demo with synthetic data eliminates real attacker threat model. Acceptable at v0.

trace.implementing_change: Slice-1 follow-up: apps/api/src/routes/auth.routes.ts /v1/auth/refresh + /v1/auth/logout handlers + sessions table writes + revocation check on /v1/me preHandler
